brief.coreMessage: HIPAA-compliant voice AI for patient communications

headlines: HIPAA-Compliant Voice AI with Sub-200ms Latency
Telnyx Voice AI: 99.999% Uptime for Healthcare Providers
One Platform for HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI Compliant Voice AI
Voice AI with Inference Co-Located on Own Network
Reduce Latency in Patient Calls with Telnyx Voice AI
HIPAA-Ready Voice AI Backed by SOC 2 Type II Compliance
Manage Patient Communications on a Single Secure Platform
Voice AI Engineered for Healthcare Compliance and Reliability
Telnyx Voice AI: Secure, Fast, and Globally Available
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI operates on a proprietary network with sub-200ms latency, ensuring secure and timely patient communications compliant with HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II, and PCI standards.
Our platform supports HIPAA-compliant voice AI across 140+ countries, delivering 99.999% uptime and eliminating the need for multiple vendors in healthcare communication workflows.
Leverage Telnyx’s own telephony infrastructure for HIPAA-ready voice AI that meets SOC 2 Type II compliance, optimizing patient interactions with low latency and high reliability.
Telnyx consolidates voice AI and telephony on one platform, providing healthcare providers with secure, compliant, and fast patient communication tools backed by proven uptime and global reach.
Engineered for healthcare, Telnyx Voice AI ensures HIPAA compliance and sub-200ms inference latency by operating on a dedicated network with SOC 2 Type II and PCI certifications.
